# VC‚Çô dimension of convex sets in ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬π, ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬≤

In the literature it is known that every convex set in ‚Ñù¬≤ has VC dimension at most 3,
and there exists a convex set in ‚Ñù¬≥ with infinite VC dimension (even more strongly,
which shatters an infinite set).

This file proves that every convex set in ‚Ñù‚Åø has finite VC‚Çô dimension, constructs a convex set in
‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬≤ with infinite VC‚Çô dimension (even more strongly, which n-shatters an infinite set),
and conjectures that every convex set in ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬π has finite VC‚Çô dimension.

    {x : Fin 4 ‚Üí Fin 2 ‚Üí ‚Ñù} {y : Set (Fin 4) ‚Üí Fin 2 ‚Üí ‚Ñù}
    (hxy : ‚àÄ i s, x i + y s ‚àà C ‚Üî i ‚àà s) : False := sorry

    ‚àÉ (C : Set (Fin 3 ‚Üí ‚Ñù)) (hC : Convex ‚Ñù C) (x : ‚Ñï ‚Üí Fin 3 ‚Üí ‚Ñù) (y : Set ‚Ñï ‚Üí Fin 3 ‚Üí ‚Ñù),
      ‚àÄ i s, x i + y s ‚àà C ‚Üî i ‚àà s := sorry

import Mathlib.Analysis.Convex.Basic
import Mathlib.Data.Real.Basic

/-!
# VC‚Çô dimension of convex sets in ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬π, ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬≤

In the literature it is known that every convex set in ‚Ñù¬≤ has VC dimension at most 3,
and there exists a convex set in ‚Ñù¬≥ with infinite VC dimension (even more strongly,
which shatters an infinite set).

This file proves that every convex set in ‚Ñù‚Åø has finite VC‚Çô dimension, constructs a convex set in
‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬≤ with infinite VC‚Çô dimension (even more strongly, which n-shatters an infinite set),
and conjectures that every convex set in ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬π has finite VC‚Çô dimension.
-/

/-! ### What's known -/

/-- Every convex set in ‚Ñù¬≤ has VC dimension at most 3. -/
lemma vc_lt_four_of_convex_r2 {C : Set (Fin 2 ‚Üí ‚Ñù)} (hC : Convex ‚Ñù C)
    {x : Fin 4 ‚Üí Fin 2 ‚Üí ‚Ñù} {y : Set (Fin 4) ‚Üí Fin 2 ‚Üí ‚Ñù}
    (hxy : ‚àÄ i s, x i + y s ‚àà C ‚Üî i ‚àà s) : False := sorry

/-- There exists a set of infinite VC dimension in ‚Ñù¬≥. -/
lemma exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty :
    ‚àÉ (C : Set (Fin 3 ‚Üí ‚Ñù)) (hC : Convex ‚Ñù C) (x : ‚Ñï ‚Üí Fin 3 ‚Üí ‚Ñù) (y : Set ‚Ñï ‚Üí Fin 3 ‚Üí ‚Ñù),
      ‚àÄ i s, x i + y s ‚àà C ‚Üî i ‚àà s := sorry

/-! ### What's new -/

/-- There exists a set of infinite VC‚Çô dimension in ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬≤. -/
lemma exists_convex_rn_add_two_vc_n_eq_infty (n : ‚Ñï) :
    ‚àÉ (C : Set (Fin (n + 2) ‚Üí ‚Ñù)) (hC : Convex ‚Ñù C) (x : Fin n ‚Üí ‚Ñï ‚Üí Fin (n + 2) ‚Üí ‚Ñù)
      (y : Set (Fin n ‚Üí ‚Ñï) ‚Üí Fin (n + 2) ‚Üí ‚Ñù),
        ‚àÄ i s, ‚àë k, x k (i k) + y s ‚àà C ‚Üî i ‚àà s := sorry

/-! ### Conjectures -/

# VC‚Çô dimension of convex sets in ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬π, ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬≤

In the literature it is known that every convex set in ‚Ñù¬≤ has VC dimension at most 3,
and there exists a convex set in ‚Ñù¬≥ with infinite VC dimension (even more strongly,
which shatters an infinite set).

This file proves that every convex set in ‚Ñù‚Åø has finite VC‚Çô dimension, constructs a convex set in
‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬≤ with infinite VC‚Çô dimension (even more strongly, which n-shatters an infinite set),
and conjectures that every convex set in ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬π has finite VC‚Çô dimension.

/-- Every convex set in ‚Ñù¬≤ has VC dimension at most 3. -/
lemma vc_lt_four_of_convex_r2 {C : Set (Fin 2 ‚Üí ‚Ñù)} (hC : Convex ‚Ñù C)
    {x : Fin 4 ‚Üí Fin 2 ‚Üí ‚Ñù} {y : Set (Fin 4) ‚Üí Fin 2 ‚Üí ‚Ñù}
    (hxy : ‚àÄ i s, x i + y s ‚àà C ‚Üî i ‚àà s) : False := sorry

/-- There exists a set of infinite VC dimension in ‚Ñù¬≥. -/
lemma exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty :
    ‚àÉ (C : Set (Fin 3 ‚Üí ‚Ñù)) (hC : Convex ‚Ñù C) (x : ‚Ñï ‚Üí Fin 3 ‚Üí ‚Ñù) (y : Set ‚Ñï ‚Üí Fin 3 ‚Üí ‚Ñù),
      ‚àÄ i s, x i + y s ‚àà C ‚Üî i ‚àà s := sorry

/-! ### What's new -/

/-- There exists a set of infinite VC‚Çô dimension in ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬≤. -/
lemma exists_convex_rn_add_two_vc_n_eq_infty (n : ‚Ñï) :
    ‚àÉ (C : Set (Fin (n + 2) ‚Üí ‚Ñù)) (hC : Convex ‚Ñù C) (x : Fin n ‚Üí ‚Ñï ‚Üí Fin (n + 2) ‚Üí ‚Ñù)

        ‚àÄ i s, ‚àë k, x k (i k) + y s ‚àà C ‚Üî i ‚àà s := sorry

import Mathlib.Analysis.Convex.Basic
import Mathlib.Data.Real.Basic

/-!
# VC‚Çô dimension of convex sets in ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬π, ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬≤

In the literature it is known that every convex set in ‚Ñù¬≤ has VC dimension at most 3,
and there exists a convex set in ‚Ñù¬≥ with infinite VC dimension (even more strongly,
which shatters an infinite set).

This file proves that every convex set in ‚Ñù‚Åø has finite VC‚Çô dimension, constructs a convex set in
‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬≤ with infinite VC‚Çô dimension (even more strongly, which n-shatters an infinite set),
and conjectures that every convex set in ‚Ñù‚Åø‚Å∫¬π has finite VC‚Çô dimension.
-/

/-- Every convex set in ‚Ñù¬≤ has VC dimension at most 3. -/

    {x : Fin 4 ‚Üí Fin 2 ‚Üí ‚Ñù} {
